title: juncus subverticillatus var. supinus
intro: Juncus subverticillatus var. supinus, commonly known as the creeping rush or bent green rush, is a type of plant in the rush family (Juncaceae). This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to treat wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Juncus subverticillatus var. supinus include its ability to aid in the healing process, reduce pain and inflammation, and even help to lower blood pressure. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, and is typically harvested in the summer months when the plant is in full growth.
